response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff engineer with 10+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level role — a severe seniority mismatch that creates strong overqualification and retention risk. Technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes) clearly exceed requirements, but PostgreSQL and Nest.js are not explicitly demonstrated (MongoDB is the listed relational/NoSQL background). High on-site presence requirement may also conflict given Berlin location is fine but candidate's recent roles appear remote-oriented. Compensation expectations likely far exceed entry-level budget.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React fullstack experience
AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD expertise exceed nice-to-haves
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, clean architecture)
concerns: Severe overqualification — Staff/Senior level applying for entry role
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience (MongoDB-heavy)
High flight risk and likely salary mismatch for junior budget
